sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: ROSEN, A HIGHLY RECOGNIZED LAW FIRM, Encourages Gartner, Inc. Investors to Secure Counsel Before Important Deadline in Securities Class Action – IT
feed.summary: The Rosen Law Firm is encouraging investors of Gartner, Inc. (NYSE: IT) who purchased common stock between February 4, 2025, and February 2, 2026, to secure legal counsel before the May 18, 2026, lead plaintiff deadline for a securities class action. The lawsuit alleges that Gartner made false or misleading statements regarding its growth rates and its ability to meet consulting revenue targets or maintain its contract value growth rate. Investors are advised to contact the firm if they suffered damages.

feed.title: PGA Tour event at Quail Hollow gets makeover with Truist as title sponsor (PHOTOS)
feed.summary: The PGA Tour event at Quail Hollow, now sponsored by Truist, will be known as the Truist Championship and features significant enhancements. The event, held in Charlotte, includes expanded corporate hospitality areas and new fan seating. This marks the first Truist Championship to be hosted in the city.

feed.title: Weyerhaeuser Co. stock (US9621661043): Why timberland strategy matters more now for U.S. investors?
feed.summary: This report analyzes Weyerhaeuser Co.'s timberland strategy, highlighting its role as a real estate investment trust (REIT) focused on owning and managing timberlands across the U.S. Amid persistent housing demand and supply constraints, its vast timberland portfolio positions it for steady gains, offering a natural hedge against inflation and generating cash flows from timber sales. The article also discusses market drivers, competitive advantages, risks, and why it's an important investment for U.S. and global investors.

feed.title: Deadline Alert: PayPal Holdings, Inc. (PYPL) Shareholders
feed.summary: Glancy Prongay Wolke & Rotter LLP reminds investors of PayPal Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: PYPL) of an upcoming April 20, 2026 deadline to file a lead plaintiff motion in a class action lawsuit. The lawsuit stems from alleged securities fraud after PayPal announced a leadership change and admitted to underperforming expectations, causing its stock price to fall significantly. Investors who purchased PayPal stock between February 8, 2024, and February 2, 2026, and suffered losses are urged to contact the firm.

feed.title: Linde plc stock (IE00BZ12WP82): Why does its industrial gases dominance matter more now for U.S. investors?
feed.summary: Linde plc, the world's largest industrial gases company, is increasingly relevant for U.S. investors due to its dominance in essential markets powering semiconductors, healthcare, and clean energy. Its stable business model, characterized by long-term contracts and high barriers to entry, provides reliable returns and positions the company to benefit from electrification and clean tech trends. Linde's strong North American presence, dividend growth, and leadership in the hydrogen economy make it an attractive defensive yet growth-oriented investment for quality-focused portfolios.

feed.title: FCX Maintained by Scotiabank -- Price Target Lowered to $71.00
feed.summary: Scotiabank has maintained its Sector Outperform rating for Freeport-McMoRan (FCX) but lowered the price target slightly to $71.00 from $72.00. Despite the positive outlook from analysts, GuruFocus indicates that FCX is currently overvalued by 46.6% based on its GF Value™ of $46.78 against a current price of $68.58, with significant insider selling also noted. The company's GF Score™ is 87/100, driven by strong growth and profitability, but hampered by a low valuation score.

feed.title: Fund Update: New $55.1M $SLB stock position opened by Hamlin Capital Management, LLC
feed.summary: Hamlin Capital Management, LLC has opened a new $55.1 million position in SLB stock, as disclosed in a recent SEC 13F filing for the report period ending March 31, 2026. The article details recent hedge fund activity, insider trading, government contracts awarded to SLB, congressional stock trading involving SLB, and current analyst ratings and price targets for the company.

feed.title: Cintas approves $0.45 quarterly dividend, payable June 15
feed.summary: Cintas Corporation has announced its Board of Directors approved a quarterly cash dividend of $0.45 per share, payable on June 15, 2026, to shareholders of record as of May 15, 2026. The company boasts a 42-year history of annual dividend increases since its initial public offering in 1983. This news comes amidst other strategic developments, including a new $2 billion revolving credit facility and analysts maintaining positive ratings on Cintas due to strong demand and potential acquisition synergies.

feed.title: Bank of America sends stark warning on global investor sentiment
feed.summary: A Bank of America survey reveals global investor sentiment is the most bearish since June 2025, with inflation expectations at a five-year high, largely due to rising oil prices from the U.S.-Iran conflict. Despite this, 70% of participants believe a recession is unlikely, expecting a "soft landing" for the global economy. This bearish sentiment extends to the crypto market, with the Crypto Fear & Greed Index showing prolonged "Fear" and "Extreme Fear" over the past year.

feed.title: The Coca-Cola Co. Names New Global Chief People Officer
feed.summary: The Coca-Cola Co. has appointed Tapaswee Chandele as its new global chief people officer, effective May 1, 2026. She will succeed Lisa Chang, who is stepping down after seven years but will remain with the company as a senior adviser through the end of 2026. Chandele previously served as senior vice president and executive assistant to the president and CFO, and has been with Coca-Cola since 2001.

feed.title: Deadline Alert: New Era Energy & Digital, Inc. (NUAI)
feed.summary: Glancy Prongay Wolke & Rotter LLP reminds investors of a June 1, 2026 deadline to file a lead plaintiff motion in a class action lawsuit against New Era Energy & Digital, Inc. (NUAI). The lawsuit alleges the company made materially false and misleading statements about its permitting progress and was involved in a fraudulent scheme to siphon revenue from oil and gas wells while avoiding environmental cleanup. This follows reports from Fuzzy Panda Research and Hunterbrook Media detailing alleged financial misconduct and a lawsuit filed by the New Mexico Attorney General.

feed.title: Watch CNBC's full interview with Oppenheimer's Ari Wald and State Street's Michael Arone
feed.summary: Oppenheimer's Ari Wald and State Street's Michael Arone were featured in a full interview on CNBC's 'Power Lunch'. They discussed current news impacting the markets. The article also includes links to other recent CNBC interviews.

feed.title: EG Maintained by B of A Securities -- Price Target Raised to $45
feed.summary: B of A Securities has maintained a 'Buy' rating for Everest Group (EG) and raised its price target to $454, up from $430. GuruFocus indicates that EG is currently undervalued by 17.7% with a GF Value™ of $412.92, trading at $339.97. The company's strong profitability and valuation metrics contribute to its GF Score™ of 72/100, despite low momentum.

feed.title: Dexcom Inc. stock (US2521311074): Is continuous glucose monitoring strong enough to unlock new upside?
feed.summary: Dexcom Inc. is a leading company in continuous glucose monitoring (CGM) technology, which is transforming diabetes care globally. The article highlights Dexcom's core business model, its strong market position driven by the expanding diabetes market, and its competitive edge against rivals like Abbott and Medtronic. It emphasizes the company's appeal to investors, particularly in English-speaking markets, due to its growth potential, recurring revenue, and alignment with healthcare trends.

feed.title: Martin Marietta Materials stock (US5732841060): Why infrastructure demand matters more now for stead
feed.summary: Martin Marietta Materials is positioned for reliable growth due to increasing U.S. infrastructure spending, leveraging its leadership in construction aggregates like crushed stone, sand, and gravel. The company's strategic acquisitions and efficient operations in regions like the Southeast and Midwest enable it to capture local pricing power and generate predictable cash flows. Despite industry cyclicality and potential risks from weather, fuel costs, and regulatory scrutiny, analysts view Martin Marietta as a strong industrial pick with stable growth prospects due to its defensive qualities and alignment with federal spending priorities.

feed.title: Comcast Settles Data Breach Lawsuit for 117 Million Dollars
feed.summary: Comcast Corp. has reached a $117.5 million class-action settlement stemming from a 2023 data breach that affected 31.6 million to 35 million current and former Xfinity customers. Eligible class members can now file claims for documented out-of-pocket losses up to $10,000, compensation for lost time, or a pro rata cash payment. Additionally, all class members will receive three years of identity defense services through CyEx Financial Shield Complete.

feed.title: Petsense by Tractor Supply to Host Nationwide Spring Adoptathon, Connecting Thousands of Pets With New Families
feed.summary: Petsense by Tractor Supply will host its nationwide Spring Adoptathon on Saturday, April 18, from 10 a.m. to 4 p.m. local time, aiming to facilitate 1,200 adoptions. This event, in partnership with Seresto and Hill’s Science Diet, will bring local shelters into Petsense stores to connect adoptable pets with new families. Adopters will receive exclusive new pet parent offers, expert guidance, and Neighbor's Club rewards to support them beyond adoption day.

feed.title: BOSS Zhipin Continues Share Repurchases, with Total Repurchases Amounting to Over RMB835 Million in 2026
feed.summary: BOSS Zhipin (Nasdaq: BZ; HK: 2076) announced the continued execution of its share repurchase program, buying back 608,328 ordinary shares for over RMB27.2 million on April 13, 2026. This brings the total share repurchases for 2026 to over RMB835 million, demonstrating the company's commitment to enhancing shareholder returns.

feed.title: Axon Enterprise Inc. stock (US05464C1018): Is public safety tech demand strong enough to drive susta
feed.summary: Axon Enterprise Inc. is a leading public safety technology provider, known for its body cameras, TASER devices, and cloud-based evidence management software. The company is actively transitioning from a hardware-centric model to one with recurring software revenue, driven by its Axon Evidence cloud platform. This shift, combined with expansion into drones and AI-powered tools, positions Axon as a key player in a growing sector supported by increasing public safety tech budgets and demand for accountability in law enforcement globally.

feed.title: Kroger’s grocery market share in Cincinnati dips slightly but it still dominates
feed.summary: Kroger Co.'s grocery market share in Greater Cincinnati has slightly dipped to 49.5%, but the company still maintains its dominant position in the region. The article notes that while its share has shifted, Kroger remains the leading player in the local grocery market.

feed.title: [8-K] Otter Tail Corp Reports Material Event
feed.summary: Otter Tail Corporation (OTTR) has reported executive leadership changes as part of its long-term succession plan. Tim Rogelstad was appointed President of Otter Tail Corporation, while Todd Wahlund became Senior Vice President and President of Otter Tail Power Company, and Tyler Nelson was elected Vice President and Chief Financial Officer. The company also detailed compensation packages for the new roles and a retention award for Senior Vice President and General Counsel Jennifer Smestad.

feed.title: Otter Tail Corp (OTTR) director receives 1,500-share stock grant
feed.summary: Otter Tail Corp director Mary E. Ludford received an equity award of 1,500 restricted shares on April 13, 2026, under the 2023 Stock Incentive Plan. These shares, valued at a fair market value of $91.15 each, will vest in near-equal installments over three years, starting April 8, 2027. Following this grant, Ludford's total direct holdings in Otter Tail Corp amount to 7,071 shares.

feed.title: Survey of 7,982 investors puts Ameriprise 3rd in advised segment
feed.summary: Ameriprise Financial, Inc. (NYSE: AMP) achieved a high investor satisfaction score, ranking third in the advised investors segment of the J.D. Power 2026 U.S. Investor Satisfaction Study℠. This recognition reflects Ameriprise's 132-year history of helping clients reach financial goals and the quality of advice and solutions provided by its advisors. The study surveyed 7,982 advised investors across various dimensions of their wealth management experience.

feed.title: Paycom Software Inc. stock (US70432V1026): Why does its all-in-one HR platform matter more now for U.S. investors?
feed.summary: Paycom Software Inc. (US70432V1026) offers an all-in-one HR and payroll platform that is gaining importance for U.S. investors due to its efficiency and integration in a shifting labor market. The company operates on a SaaS model, focusing on mid-market businesses, and its single-stack architecture differentiates it from competitors. Despite macro sensitivities and rising competition, analysts maintain a favorable outlook, recognizing Paycom's resilience and strong execution in the HR tech space.

feed.title: Walmart, Inc. Experiences Evaluation Revision Amidst Mixed Performance Indicators and Market Dynamics
feed.summary: Walmart, Inc. has revised its evaluation due to changing market dynamics, with its stock showing a strong annual return of 39.94%, outperforming the S&P 500. While recent technical indicators suggest a mixed outlook, with some bullish and some bearish trends, the company has demonstrated resilience with a 13.81% year-to-date return despite challenges over longer periods. The evaluation highlights Walmart's ongoing efforts to navigate the retail landscape amid fluctuating market conditions.

feed.title: Altria Group Inc. stock (US02209S1033): Why does its smoke-free pivot matter more now for U.S. investors?
feed.summary: Altria Group Inc. is at a critical juncture, aggressively shifting towards smoke-free products like oral nicotine pouches (on!) and e-vapor options (NJOY) to counteract declining cigarette volumes. This strategic pivot is becoming increasingly important for U.S. investors as regulatory pressures and changing consumer behaviors accelerate the need for diversification. Success in this transition, despite regulatory and execution risks, is key to sustaining the company's dividend reliability and long-term value.

feed.title: Altria Group Inc. stock (US02209S1033): Why does its smoke-free pivot matter more now for U.S. inves
feed.summary: Altria Group Inc. is at a critical juncture, aggressively shifting towards smoke-free products like oral nicotine pouches (on!) and e-vapor (NJOY) to offset declining cigarette volumes. This pivot is crucial for U.S. investors, impacting the reliability of Altria's high-yield dividend amidst regulatory pressures and changing consumer behaviors. While traditional cigarettes still drive revenue, the company's long-term value increasingly depends on the success and scaling of its smoke-free portfolio to meet its 2030 targets.

feed.title: CINF Maintained by B of A Securities -- Price Target Lowered to $177
feed.summary: B of A Securities analyst Grace Carter maintained a 'Buy' rating for Cincinnati Financial (CINF) but slightly lowered the price target to $177.00 from $178.00. Despite this minor adjustment, CINF is considered 1.6% undervalued with a strong GF Score™ of 82/100, and recent insider buying signals confidence in the company's future. The company, a significant player in the insurance industry, shows strong momentum and valuation but faces challenges in growth potential.

feed.title: Citi Reiterates Buy rating for Boston Scientific (BSX)
feed.summary: Citi has reiterated a Buy rating on Boston Scientific (BSX), despite a recent reduction in its price target from $98 to $87, still implying over 40% upside potential. The medical technology segment faces uncertainties, leading to revised estimates. Boston Scientific is also navigating a regulatory review with Penumbra Inc. for their proposed merger, extending the mandatory waiting period.

feed.title: UDR Inc. stock (US9029011082): Is its apartment focus strong enough to unlock new upside?
feed.summary: UDR Inc. (US9029011082) specializes in owning and operating high-quality multifamily apartment communities in key U.S. markets, positioning it for steady returns amidst persistent U.S. housing demand and high interest rates. The company's strategy focuses on portfolio optimization and targeted development, leveraging strong rental demand in urban and Sun Belt regions. While analyst sentiment is generally positive, risks include interest rate sensitivity and potential oversupply in some markets, requiring investors to monitor economic data and company guidance.

feed.title: Natera Positioned To Capture Growing $20 Billion MRD Opportunity-Analyst
feed.summary: William Blair initiated coverage on Natera (NASDAQ: NTRA), emphasizing the company's strong position in the growing minimal residual disease (MRD) testing market, estimated at over $20 billion. Analyst Andrew Brackmann projects Natera's MRD revenue, estimated at nearly $1 billion in 2025, to grow over 40% in 2026 and potentially fivefold over time. Natera's competitive advantages in clinical evidence, commercial infrastructure, and a diversified multi-segment strategy, including noninvasive prenatal testing (NIPT) and organ health, are expected to ensure long-term growth despite potential new market entrants.

feed.title: NiSource, Inc. Hits New 52-Week High of $48.75, Surges 70.49%
feed.summary: NiSource, Inc. (NI) reached a new 52-week high of $48.75 on April 9, 2026, marking a 70.49% increase over the past year. The company boasts a market capitalization of approximately $22,904 million, a P/E ratio of 23.00, and a dividend yield of 102.23%. This performance significantly outperforms the S&P 500's growth of 25.06% during the same period, reflecting NiSource's strong financial health and stability in the gas industry.

feed.title: Palo Alto Networks Completes $300M Acquisition of Koi Security
feed.summary: Palo Alto Networks has completed its $300 million acquisition of San Francisco-based cybersecurity startup, Koi Security. This strategic move aims to expand Palo Alto Networks' cloud security portfolio and strengthen its market position. The integration of Koi Security's technology and talent is expected to enhance Palo Alto Networks' existing product offerings.

feed.title: Cincinnati Financial Corporation (NASDAQ:CINF) Receives Consensus Rating of "Moderate Buy" from Brokerages
feed.summary: Cincinnati Financial Corporation (NASDAQ:CINF) has received a consensus rating of "Moderate Buy" from five brokerages, with an average 1-year price target of $174.75. Analysts have updated price targets and ratings, including adjustments from Piper Sandler, Bank of America, and Keefe, Bruyette & Woods, while Weiss Ratings and Wall Street Zen lowered their ratings. The company recently reported strong Q4 earnings, beating estimates with $3.37 EPS and 21.8% revenue growth year-over-year, and increased its quarterly dividend to $0.94.

feed.title: Patton Fund Management Boosts Stake in WEC Energy Group
feed.summary: Patton Fund Management Inc. has significantly increased its stake in WEC Energy Group, Inc. by 77.6% during the fourth quarter, reflecting strong institutional confidence in the Midwest utility company. The investment firm now holds 44,812 shares, valued at $4.7 million, indicating a positive outlook on WEC Energy Group's financial stability and growth potential. This move highlights the continued appeal of regulated utility stocks for their stable dividends and growth prospects amidst economic uncertainties.

feed.title: AT&T, Inc. Experiences Revision in Its Stock Evaluation Amid Competitive Market Landscape
feed.summary: AT&T, Inc. has undergone a stock evaluation revision, with its P/E ratio at 8 and a dividend yield of 3.82%. Despite recent declines, the company has achieved a modest year-to-date return amidst a competitive telecom market where peers like T-Mobile US, Inc. exhibit higher valuations. Its return on capital employed is 11.11% and return on equity is 22.30%.

feed.title: Illinois Tool Works stock (US4523081093): Why its diversified model stands out in uncertain markets?
feed.summary: Illinois Tool Works (ITW) is highlighted as a stable investment due to its diversified operations across various industrial segments like automotive, food equipment, and welding, reducing risks associated with single-industry exposure. The company's unique decentralized business model allows for innovation and quick market responses, fostering higher margins and consistent performance across economic cycles. ITW's focus on niche markets with strong positions, its 80/20 principle for efficiency, and its deep embedding in supply chains contribute to its resilience and appeal for both U.S. and global investors seeking long-term value.

feed.title: Is Colgate-Palmolive (CL) Pricing Look Attractive After Recent Share Price Pullback?
feed.summary: This article analyzes Colgate-Palmolive (CL) stock after a recent share price pullback, examining its valuation attractiveness. Using a Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) model, the stock appears undervalued by 33.0%, with an intrinsic value of $125.28 per share compared to its current price of $83.98. However, when assessed by its P/E ratio of 31.60x, Colgate-Palmolive screens as overvalued compared to the industry average and Simply Wall St's Fair Ratio of 23.58x.

feed.title: (Energie): AES Corp's Renewables Push Faces Grid and Policy Hurdles
feed.summary: AES Corp is accelerating its clean energy projects to meet surging U.S. electricity demand, particularly from data centers and electrification. While the company demonstrates strong execution with projects like the SunZia transmission line and partnerships with hyperscalers, it faces significant challenges from grid bottlenecks, regulatory delays, rising costs, and policy uncertainty. Investors should weigh its attractive dividend and growth potential against these operational and political hurdles.

feed.title: Advanced Micro Devices, Inc. stock (US0079031078): Is AI chip dominance strong enough to unlock sustained upside?
feed.summary: The article analyzes whether Advanced Micro Devices (AMD) can sustain its growth by leveraging its position in the AI chip market. It details AMD's business model, product lineup including Ryzen CPUs, EPYC CPUs, and Instinct MI GPUs, and its competitive stance against Nvidia and Intel. The report also highlights key risks like intense competition and supply chain issues, and provides insights for U.S. and English-speaking investors.

feed.title: Monopoly Spiel: Hasbro's Iconic Game Faces Digital Shift Challenges
feed.summary: Hasbro's classic Monopoly game is navigating a significant shift towards digital platforms and licensing, impacting its future and HAS stock. While the physical game maintains strong sales, especially during holidays, digital adaptations like Monopoly GO! are driving increasing engagement and revenue. The company is balancing its traditional board game appeal with new digital investments, facing competition from other popular games and the broader shift in consumer spending habits.

feed.title: Advanced Micro Devices, Inc. stock (US0079031078): Is AI chip dominance strong enough to unlock sust
feed.summary: This article examines Advanced Micro Devices, Inc. (AMD)'s position in the semiconductor industry, particularly its strategic focus on AI accelerators, and its potential for long-term growth for investors. It discusses AMD's business model, product lineup including Ryzen CPUs and Instinct MI series GPUs, and its competitive stance against Nvidia and Intel. The report also highlights key risks such as intense competition and supply constraints, while noting positive analyst outlooks on AMD's undervalued position in the AI market.

feed.title: A Look At Motorola Solutions (MSI) Valuation After Its New T‑Mobile Satellite Connectivity Collaboration
feed.summary: Motorola Solutions (MSI) is gaining attention after partnering with T-Mobile to integrate satellite connectivity, including Starlink's direct-to-cell network, into its APX NEXT smart radios for first responders. The company's stock has shown strong long-term momentum, with a 148.78% five-year total shareholder return. While one valuation narrative suggests MSI is 9.8% undervalued with a fair value of $487.90, emphasizing its shift towards software and recurring services, the Simply Wall St DCF model indicates it might be overvalued at its current price of $439.91, suggesting a fair value of $376.12.

feed.title: Seagate Technology Holdings PLC Stock (STX) Moved Up by 3.18% on Apr 14: Key Drivers Unveiled
feed.summary: Seagate Technology Holdings PLC (STX) stock increased by 3.18% on April 14, driven primarily by robust demand for its data storage solutions from the AI and data center sectors. The company reported strong Q2 2026 results exceeding expectations and issued optimistic guidance, leading to bullish analyst ratings and increased price targets. Despite positive market sentiment, the stock exhibits intraday volatility due to overvaluation concerns, potential technological disruption, insider selling, and high debt levels.

feed.title: Jeanne Crain receives restricted stock grant at Otter Tail (OTTR)
feed.summary: Otter Tail Corporation director Jeanne H. Crain received a grant of 1,500 restricted shares of Common Stock on April 13, 2026, under the company's 2023 Stock Incentive Plan. The shares, valued at $91.15 each, will vest in three equal annual installments starting April 8, 2027. Following this grant, Crain's total direct holdings in Otter Tail number 7,071 shares.

feed.title: American Express to Back Purchases Made by Customers’ AI Agents
feed.summary: American Express announced its new "Amex Agent Purchase Protection" policy, which extends customer protection to purchases made by registered AI agents. This initiative aims to ensure trust and security in AI-powered commerce by authenticating both the human and the AI agent's intent. Additionally, Amex is releasing an Agentic Commerce Experiences (ACE) developer kit to integrate its payment capabilities into AI interactions.

feed.title: MarketAxess stock (US57060D1081): Why its electronic trading dominance matters more now for fixed in
feed.summary: MarketAxess (MKTX) is a leader in electronic trading for credit markets, offering a platform that streamlines fixed income trading through features like Open Trading and data analytics. Its dominance is particularly important now due to rising volatility and regulatory pushes for efficiency in U.S. and global fixed income markets. The company's competitive edge, scalability, and focus on credit trading position it as an attractive investment for those seeking exposure to fintech innovation in capital markets, despite potential risks from competition and economic slowdowns.

feed.title: Omada Health wins New Outperform at Citizens (OMDA:NASDAQ)
feed.summary: Omada Health (OMDA) received a new Market Outperform rating from Citizens, with a price target of $18 per share. The analyst cited a compelling risk-reward profile for the virtual care provider. Following this news, Omada Health's stock traded higher on Tuesday.

feed.title: Cintas Keeps Quarterly Dividend at $0.45 a Share, Payable June 15 to Shareholders of Record as of May 15
feed.summary: Cintas Corporation has announced that it will maintain its quarterly dividend at $0.45 per share. The dividend is set to be paid on June 15, 2026, to shareholders who are on record as of May 15, 2026. This decision was published on April 14, 2026.

feed.title: Novanta Inc. Announces Schedule of First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release and Conference Call
feed.summary: Novanta Inc. (Nasdaq: NOVT) will release its first-quarter 2026 financial results after the U.S. market closes on Monday, May 11, 2026. The company will host a conference call on Tuesday, May 12, 2026, at 8:00 a.m. ET to discuss these results. A live webcast and replay will be available on the Investors section of Novanta's website.
